message:
chore: update Cargo.lock with new transitive dependencies

Adds hashbrown 0.14.5 to fsqlite-core, fsqlite-wal, and fsqlite-vdbe;
smallvec to ftui-layout; arc-swap to ftui-runtime; and ftui-runtime to
ftui-widgets — reflecting upstream dependency changes in workspace crates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2149,6 +2149,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "fsqlite-vdbe",
  "fsqlite-vfs",
  "fsqlite-wal",
+ "hashbrown 0.14.5",
  "serde",
  "serde_json",
  "tracing",
@@ -2258,6 +2259,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "fsqlite-error",
  "fsqlite-types",
  "fsqlite-vfs",
+ "hashbrown 0.14.5",
  "parking_lot",
  "xxhash-rust",
 ]
@@ -2313,6 +2315,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "fsqlite-parser",
  "fsqlite-types",
  "fsqlite-wal",
+ "hashbrown 0.14.5",
  "smallvec",
  "tempfile",
  "tracing",
@@ -2415,6 +2418,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "ftui-core",
  "rustc-hash",
  "serde",
+ "smallvec",
 ]
 
 [[package]]
@@ -2435,6 +2439,7 @@ dependencies = [
 name = "ftui-runtime"
 version = "0.2.1"
 dependencies = [
+ "arc-swap",
  "ftui-backend",
  "ftui-core",
  "ftui-i18n",
@@ -2497,6 +2502,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "ftui-core",
  "ftui-layout",
  "ftui-render",
+ "ftui-runtime",
  "ftui-style",
  "ftui-text",
  "unicode-segmentation",
